name: closed loop step audit-to-diff flows audit-recommended changes into the diff input
command: mkdir -p standards && printf 'recommendations: [{source: owasp-asvs, action: review}]\n' > standards/audit.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step audit-to-diff --audit standards/audit.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'audit_recommendation=owasp-asvs flowed_into=diff' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
